extension.description: Official repository for the Starfleet Kodi addon. Provides plugin.video.starfleet — TV Shows, Movies, Live TV, Sports, Free Streaming, Adult (PIN-protected), Radio.
extension.news: v1.0.2 - Add smrzips/unhingedthemes/animaniac/dobbelina dirs for ResolveURL + ResolveURL XXX v1.0.1 - Fix repository schema for Kodi 21 (Omega) v1.0.0 - Initial release

extension.summary: Starfleet — TV, Movies, Live TV, Sports, Radio, Adult
extension.description:
All-in-one Kodi plugin.
TV SHOWS — Browse, search and stream TV shows with full metadata, cast, episode stills, ratings and trailers powered by TMDB and TVDB.
MOVIES — Popular, top rated, now playing, browse by genre and search, powered by TMDB with full cast, director, backdrop and trailer support.
LIVE TV — Unified channel list from Samsung TV+, Plex FAST, Pluto TV, TVA (Québecor) and Global News (14 Canadian regions) via Google DAI. Channel logos loaded automatically. Source picker for duplicates. All sources fetched in parallel via ThreadPoolExecutor.
SPORTS — Live and upcoming events from istreameast.cx and crackstreams.mx. Categories: NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, UFC, Boxing, Soccer, Formula 1, College Football, College Basketball, CFL, WWE/Wrestling. TheSportsDB and ESPN league logos, game times, LIVE indicator. Stream dialog with quality labels.
FREE STREAMING — Movies and TV shows from Popcornflix, Fawesome, Filmzie, Midnight Pulp, DistroTV, BounceTV, and Radial Entertainment. TMDB metadata, artwork and actor photos. Plays via debrid torrent pipeline (720p+).
ADULT — Full metadata from Adult Film Database (cast photos, studios, categories, ratings, director). Free streams from 5 sources (freeomovie.to, xxxmoviestream.org, watchpornfree.info, pornwatch.ws, speedporn.net) — deduplicated and merged by title. Source picker dialog. PIN protection.
DEBRID / TORRENTS — All movie and TV play buttons search YTS, The Pirate Bay, 1337x, and EZTV for 720p+ cached torrents. Instant availability checked on Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize and TorBox. Quality shown in dialog labels (4K, 1080p, 720p, 3D). Nothing below 720p is ever shown.
RADIO — 90,000+ stations worldwide via Radio Browser. Navigate by country (with flag emoji), region/province/state, then city A-Z.
Fast loading: SQLite/Pickle binary cache, parallel threading, connection pooling, hot memory cache, reuselanguageinvoker. Compatible with Kodi 19 (Matrix), 20 (Nexus), 21 (Omega) and newer.
extension.news:
v1.5.0 - Movies: New Releases shows films released in the last 30 days - Movies: List view shows cast/director/genre/runtime when detail cached - Adult: Box art extracted from HTML (fixes 404s), scene screenshots shown - Torrents: Added Bitsearch.to and TorrentGalaxy scrapers - Personal: MixDrop + Streamtape personal library search added as sources
v1.4.0 - Adult: site-specific title search (/?s=title) replaces page-1 catalog scan Films anywhere in site archives are now findable, not just most recent - Movies: added New Releases (upcoming) section powered by TMDB /movie/upcoming - Torrent search timeout reduced 20s→8s for faster source picker response
v1.3.0 - Movies + TV: unified source picker (free streams + debrid/torrents in parallel) - Popcornflix + Archive.org title search added to source pipeline - Adult: ADE fallback metadata, parallel stream search, source picker dialog
v1.2.0 - Sports: Live/upcoming events from istreameast.cx + crackstreams.mx NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, UFC, Boxing, Soccer, F1, CFB, NCAAB, CFL, WWE TheSportsDB/ESPN logos, game times, LIVE indicator, stream picker dialog - Free Streaming: Movies and TV from Popcornflix, Fawesome, Filmzie, Midnight Pulp, DistroTV, BounceTV, Radial Entertainment TMDB metadata + artwork, plays via debrid pipeline - Adult: 5 free stream sources (added watchpornfree.info, pornwatch.ws, speedporn.net). All sources merged by title, single entry per film. Source picker dialog: "Link 1 — Label, Link 2 — Label..." - Debrid/Torrents: 720p+ quality filter for all torrent sources. YTS (movies), TPB via apibay.org (movies+TV), 1337x (movies+TV), EZTV (TV shows). Quality shown in picker: "Debrid 1 (RD - Source 1080p)" - Kodi 20 (Nexus) + 21 (Omega) compatibility verified
v1.1.0 - Live TV: Added Global News (14 Canadian regions) via Google DAI - Live TV: Channel logos from Clearbit CDN for DAI channels - Adult: Free streams from freeomovie.to + xxxmoviestream.org, deduplicated - Adult: Full AFDB actor detail (measurements, height, eyes, hair, ethnicity) - Premium: Added TorBox resolver support - Settings: Cleaned up dead VOD settings, added TorBox configuration - Performance: All parallel ThreadPoolExecutor fetching for live sources
v1.0.0 - TV Shows: TMDB + TVDB metadata, seasons, episodes with stills - Movies: TMDB popular/top/new/genre/search with full cast - Live TV: Samsung TV+, Plex, Pluto TV, TVA+ (Québecor) with logos - Unified live channel list with multi-source picker dialog - Radio: 90,000+ stations, country flags, city-level browse - Adult: AFDB metadata, actor photos, studio and category browse - Premium resolvers: Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize - PIN protection and hide toggle for Adult section - SQLite Pickle binary cache, ThreadPoolExecutor parallel fetching - reuselanguageinvoker for near-instant warm navigation
